productDisplayName: Fila Men Novarro White Sports Shoes
description: Get ready to play better for longer in these Novarro shoes from fila. These stylish tennis shoes are a great combination of a snug, performance-like Fit and lightweight feel. These can also be teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper ·    Perforated synthetic uppers for greater breathability ·    Lace-ups for snug fit and to lock the foot in place ·    Cushioned collar and tongue for greater comfort ·    Brand logo on the sides, tongue and heel counter for style ·    Mesh tongue for greater breathability and snug fitMidsole ·    Full-length EVA midsole for lightweight comfort ·    Cushioned footbed for comfort ·    Outsole ·    Durable rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for better traction and effective versatility on all court surfaces ·    Built up toe bumper that wraps around the medial side of the forefoot for excellent toe drag protection ·    Circular suction pads for greater grip and pivot point for easier 180 degree movement ·    Lightweight plastic shank provides torsional stabilityWash care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash
